rulings.Case Title: HARVEY NULL VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION Notice Of Motion To Set The Deposition Of Dr. Herman Bruch After The Initial Trial Date
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Tuesday, November 6, 2012 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 2. Plaintiff¿s motion to set the deposition of Dr. Herman Bruch after the initial trial date: hearing required. The hearing will be at 9:30am, not 9:00am. Both sides must bring proposed orders to the hearing. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If any party wishes to have the matter reported, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. There will be only one official record in a case. The designated reporter must be licensed pursuant to Bus. & Prof. Code, Sec. 8016. If the parties are unable to agree on one reporter, the court will designate a qualified court reporter that will provide the official transcript for the matter. The party or parties shall pay for the cost of reporter. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: GLENDA WALLS et al VS. CERTAINTEED CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant Bryan Steam, Llc To Produce Custodian(S) Of Records And Person(S) Most Knowledgeable For Deposition And Responsive Documents; Proof Of Service
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Tuesday, November 6, 2012 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel defendant Bryan Steam, LLC to produce custodian of records and person most knowledgeable for deposition and responsive documents is continued on the court¿s own motion to December 4, 2012 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 503. The parties are ordered to further meet and confer. If all issues raised by the motion have not been resolved, then by November 29, 2012 at 4:00pm the parties must send an email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org stating, without argument, the issues that remain in dispute and then must appear at the hearing on December 4, 2012. = (503/TLJ)
